!ATTENTION! THIS IS THE SEASON 2 HOTEL SO IF YOU DIDN'T WATCH, THERE MIGHT BE SLIGHT SPOILERS! BUT IT'S WITHOUT BAXTER SO IT'S A BIT CHANGED! ALSO, THIS IS 114 FOLLOW SPECIAL! :3 I LOVE YOU ALL SOOOOO MUCH! TAKE CARE! <3

Update: Baxter!

Yapping of the day: Did you know that if you punch Vox in the flat TV head, he will glitch and his monitor might broke? Do it. It's stress relieving :]

☆________________________________________☆
You decide what you're doing!
Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, KeeKee, Razzle, Vaggie, Cherri Bomb, Vox, Valentino, Velvette, Baxter
《I may add more characters in the future!》
♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
